name: §6Grandma Wolf
description:
§8Combat Pet

§7Health: §c100
§7Strength: §c25

§6Kill Combo
§7Gain buffs for combo kills. Effects
§7stack as you increase your combo.

§a5 Combo §8(lasts §a10s§8)
  §b+3% ✯ Magic Find
§a10 Combo §8(lasts §a8s§8)
  §8+§610 §7coins per kill
§a15 Combo §8(lasts §a6s§8)
  §b+3% ✯ Magic Find
§a20 Combo §8(lasts §a5s§8)
  §3+15☯ Combat Wisdom
§a25 Combo §8(lasts §a4s§8)
  §b+3% ✯ Magic Find
§a30 Combo §8(lasts §a3s§8)
  §8+§610 §7coins per kill

§8This pet's perks are active even
§8when the pet is not summoned!

§eRight-click to add this pet to your
§epet menu!

variants.lore:
§8Consumed on use

§7Pet skins change the look and
§7particle trail of your pet but only
§7one skin can be active at a time!

§7This skin can only be applied to
§aGrandma Wolf§7 pets.

§eRight-click on your summoned pet to
§eapply this skin!
